title: Wearable Lanterns
description: A vanilla friendly and open-source mod that intends to make the lanterns more useful when adventuring or caving.
body:
This mod introduces a craftable lantern that can be worn on the lantern trinket slot, providing a hands-free light for your mining escapades. It can also be upgraded to a waterproof lantern, so it never turns dark when you're exploring deep under sea!

### Wearable Lantern ![recipe for normal wearable lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26d1fe7ebb2a7ca1d6db23a983823bb23d1b9a8c.png)


### Wearable Soul Lantern ![recipe for normal wearable soul lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/355d84bebbed3cb04689988d595a6f37f67ed875.png)


### Wearable Encased Lantern ![recipe for waterproof wearable lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e273926e71efbd367bb06c59dae165f7262e0b3.png)


### Wearable Encased Soul Lantern ![recipe for waterproof wearable soul lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b353871bb52469b239ed8818070f06f90378c3.png)


## Dependencies: - [LambDynamicLights]() - [Trinkets]() - [Radiant Gear]()
